changes.value:
## What

Implement the BLOCKED virtual tag strategy. A task is BLOCKED when it has at least one dependency that is NOT in the terminal column.

**Files to modify:**
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/virtual_tags.rs` ‚Äî add `BlockedStrategy` struct implementing `VirtualTagStrategy`:
  - `slug()` ‚Üí `\"BLOCKED\"`
  - `color()` ‚Üí `\"e36209\"` (orange ‚Äî signals caution/wait)
  - `description()` ‚Üí `\"Task has unmet dependencies\"`
  - `matches()` ‚Üí reuse logic from `task_blocked_by()` ‚Äî true if blocked_by is non-empty
- Register in `default_virtual_tag_registry()`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `BlockedStrategy` implements `VirtualTagStrategy`
- [ ] Task with unmet dep ‚Üí has BLOCKED tag
- [ ] Task with no deps ‚Üí does NOT have BLOCKED tag
- [ ] Task with all deps complete ‚Üí does NOT have BLOCKED tag
- [ ] Registered in default registry

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test: task with incomplete dep matches BLOCKED
- [ ] Unit test: task with no deps does not match BLOCKED
- [ ] Unit test: task with all deps complete does not match BLOCKED
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` passes

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` ‚Äî write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
